name: Hack Squat
lead: Exercise for thigh and buttock muscles

instructions.starting position: Standing in the "hack squat" machine, trapezes under the pads, feet on the footrest, shoulder-width apart.
instructions.execution: Release the manual safety catch and slowly bend the knees. When your knees are at a 90° angle, pause for a moment and then slowly raise the load. Keep your back firmly against the backrest.
